profile.description: HDFC Bank believes that modern banking is about more than managing money; it's about fulfilling aspirations and shaping the futures of its customers and communities. The institution's core purpose is to help every Indian make better money choices, for both today and for the future, fostering financial well-being nationwide.

ICICI Bank is India’s second-largest private sector bank, headquartered in Mumbai. It provides a comprehensive range of banking products and financial services to corporate and retail customers through a variety of delivery channels and specialized subsidiaries.

With a legacy of over 200 years, State Bank of India has solidified its position as the country's largest bank, playing a pivotal role in the nation's financial landscape. The bank's vision is to be the preferred choice for a transforming India, guiding the nation's financial progress and adapting to its evolving needs.

Axis Bank is India's third-largest private sector bank, providing a complete suite of banking products and financial services covering retail, wholesale, and treasury operations. Its guiding vision is to be the preferred financial services provider, excelling in customer service delivery through insightful employees and the smart application of modern technology.

A subsidiary of Bajaj Finserv, Bajaj Finance is one of India’s largest and most diversified Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs). Headquartered in Pune, it has evolved from a captive auto-financier into a fintech powerhouse offering consumer durables financing, SME lending, and wealth management.

Established in 1985, Kotak is one of India's leading diversified and integrated financial services conglomerates, providing a wide range of financial solutions across India. Its primary goal is to make banking simple and understandable by truly catering to the needs of its customers and infusing simplicity into every transaction.

HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited is a publicly listed life insurance provider in India, promoted by the country's leading private sector bank, HDFC Bank Limited. The company's vision is to be the most successful and admired Life Insurance Company, making it the most obvious choice for all its customers.

Bajaj Finserv Limited is one of India's largest diversified financial services groups, serving as a financial lifecycle partner to the country's mass-affluent and middle-income population. The company's vision is to be a diversified yet integrated financial services entity with a pan-India presence, offering lifecycle financial solutions for its various customers.

Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is a global leader in IT services, consulting, and business solutions. The company leverages its deep industry knowledge and technology expertise to help clients transform their businesses and achieve their strategic objectives. TCS is committed to delivering innovative solutions that drive business value and enhance customer experiences.

Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. The company enables clients in 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation, leveraging its expertise in technology, engineering, and business processes. Infosys is committed to delivering innovative solutions that drive business value and enhance customer experiences.

Wipro Limited is a leading global information technology, consulting, and business process services company. The company harnesses the power of cognitive computing, hyper-automation, robotics, cloud, analytics, and emerging technologies to help clients adapt to the digital world and make them successful.

HCL Technologies is a global technology company that helps enterprises reimagine their businesses for the digital age. The company offers an integrated portfolio of products, solutions, services, and IP through its Mode 1-2-3 strategy, built around digital, IoT, cloud, automation, cybersecurity, analytics, infrastructure management, and engineering services.

Tech Mahindra is a leading provider of digital transformation, consulting, and business reengineering services and solutions. The company enables enterprises, associates, and the society to Rise™ by leveraging its deep domain knowledge, technology expertise, and innovation capabilities.

Larsen & Toubro Infotech (LTI) is a global technology consulting and digital solutions company, helping more than 400 clients succeed in a converging world. The company specializes in digital transformation, providing innovative solutions that leverage the power of technology to drive business growth and efficiency.

Reliance Industries Limited is a Fortune Global 500 company and the largest private sector company in India. The company's growth mirrors the relentless spirit of dynamism and hope that defines the nation, with its core motto being 'Growth is Life'. Its mission is to be the most admired, innovative, and value-generating organisation for all its stakeholders, operating through growth engines like retail and digital services.
Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) is India's largest crude oil and natural gas company, engaged in exploration and production activities globally.

Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) is a Maharatna energy giant and a cornerstone of India’s petroleum sector. As the nation’s second-largest oil marketing company, it operates an extensive downstream network of over 21,000 fuel stations and 6,200 LPG distributorships.

Power Grid Corporation of India Limited is a leading transmission company globally and a 'Maharatna' Public Sector Enterprise of the Government of India. Its vision is to become a world-class, integrated, global transmission company with dominant leadership in emerging power markets, ensuring reliability, safety, and economy. A key part of its mission is to set superior standards in capital project management and operations for the industry.

As India's largest power company, NTPC Limited holds a commanding 17% share of the country's total installed electricity generation capacity, playing a vital role in national energy security. The company's vision is to be the world's most prominent power company by actively fueling the growth and development of India.

Maruti Suzuki India was founded with the vision to put the nation on wheels by providing the 'Joy of Mobility' and is now a leader in the Indian automobile industry. The company is committed to partnering in India's journey to become a developed nation, known as Viksit Bharat, by the year 2047.

Tata Motors (CV) is India’s largest commercial vehicle manufacturer and a global leader in the trucks and buses segment. Post-demerger, it operates as a focused entity housing the entire domestic and international CV business, including small, light, medium, and heavy trucks, as well as buses and defense vehicles.

Bajaj Auto is the world’s third-largest manufacturer of motorcycles and the largest manufacturer of three-wheelers. Headquartered in Pune, it is the flagship company of the Bajaj Group. Bajaj Auto has solidified its leadership in the electric vehicle (EV) segment with the Chetak range and recently disrupted the market by launching the world’s first CNG-powered motorcycle.

Eicher Motors Limited is an Indian multinational automotive company that manufactures iconic motorcycles under the Royal Enfield brand and modern commercial vehicles. The company's approach is defined as 'Pure Motorcycling,' which focuses on filling a rider's life with real and authentic experiences.
Hero MotoCorp Limited is the world's largest manufacturer of two-wheelers, producing a wide range of motorcycles and scooters.

Hindustan Unilever Limited (HUL) is India’s largest Fast-Moving Consumer Goods company, guided by the belief that 'What is good for India, is good for HUL'. The company is focused on unlocking a billion aspirations, not just for its consumers, but for every stakeholder across its entire value chain.

ITC Limited is one of India's foremost private sector enterprises, operating across agriculture, manufacturing, and services to contribute significantly to the national economy. The company's core vision is to create substantial societal value through a model of 'Responsible Competitiveness,' ensuring business growth also benefits society and the environment.

Nestlé India Limited is a major player in the country's food business, manufacturing and marketing a wide array of products for consumers. Guided by its promise to enhance life's quality, the company is dedicated to unlocking the power of food for both today's consumers and for future generations.
